description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a bold, multi-color design with dominant shades of orange, teal, tan, and brown. The upper is constructed from a combination of smooth and textured synthetic materials, with a patterned textile section wrapping around the heel and ankle. The shoe has a robust, chunky sole in dark brown, providing both height and a modern, urban aesthetic. The lacing system is standard criss-cross, with teal eyelets and brown laces, and the tongue is padded for comfort. Subtle design accents, such as a star-shaped patch on the heel and layered paneling, add visual interest. The overall build suggests durability and style, suitable for streetwear or casual urban use.
description: A high-top sneaker with a chunky brown sole, multi-color upper in orange, teal, tan, and brown, and a patterned textile heel. Features standard criss-cross lacing and layered paneling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered orange, tan, and teal panels, patterned textile heel, and chunky brown sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the brown laces, teal tongue, and perforated orange toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar color blocking and visible teal and tan accents, plus the patterned textile heel.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the star-shaped patch, patterned textile heel wrap, and teal accent on the collar.
